---
title: "All journals"
---

```{r}
source("scripts/site_helpers.R")
```

Every journal covered by an agreement in which at least one TU9 university takes
part. A journal can appear under more than one agreement.

Download this data as CSV: [`journals.csv`](https://github.com/slub/tu9-jct-data/blob/main/data/journals.csv).

```{r}
journals_table(read_data("journals.csv"))
```
